name: Creator Media OS
next_task: Formalize likeness-consent, revocation, and the record-once/generate-many channel workflow before implementation.
current_focus: Concept captured from conversation history: AI-assisted business/YouTube video production with script, scenes, likeness, editing, and SEO in one channel-memory system.
completion_checks: SEO + production pipeline are defined from one source asset set
anti_drift_notes: This is not Story Studio and not generic AI video. Do not collapse creator-media workflows into story/franchise workflows.

decision_debt.description: Likeness and revocation contract model must exist before build
Ad-revenue or payout logic is intentionally deferred
